pass_summaries.summary: Rebuilt chapter 19 around an immediate Vel/Maren payoff, expanded the reunion and council material to carry the chapter's emotional and political load, clarified Sera as living proof that vanished Scour crossers survive below, removed the Ch19-local signet and Sable-hair repetition, and brought the chapter above the minimum word-count threshold. One cross-chapter Sable-duration inconsistency remains only partially resolved because the conflicting references are outside the allowed edit scope.

Addressed both packet findings with targeted prose revisions: the chapter now trusts concrete action and object handling in the arrival/signet/path sequences, and the flagged fragment-heavy beats now read as grammatically complete prose.
